} normSignal = clamp(normSignal, 0.0, 1.0); return normSignal; } float calculateHlgSysGamma(float peakDSLNits) { float sysGammaBase = 1.2; float sysGamma = 0.0; if ((400.0 <= peakDSLNits) && (peakDSLNits <= 2000.0)) { sysGamma = sysGammaBase + 0.42 * innerLog10(peakDSLNits / 2000.0); } else { sysGamma = sysGammaBase * pow(1.111, innerLog2(peakDSLNits / 2000.0)); } return sysGamma; } float hlgInvOOTF(float sceneLuminance, float displayLightComponent, float peakDSLNits) { float sysGamma = calculateHlgSysGamma(peakDSLNits); float sceneLightComponent = 0.0; if (sceneLuminance == 0.0) { sceneLightComponent = 0.0; } else { sceneLightComponent = pow(sceneLuminance / peakDSLNits, (1.0 - sysGamma) / sysGamma) * displayLightComponent / peakDSLNits; color.rgb = clamp(color.rgb, 0.0, 1.0); if (uUseHDRDisplaySettings == 1) { backColor.r = hlgInvOOTF(luminance, backColor.r, uPeekNits); backColor.g = hlgInvOOTF(luminance, backColor.g, uPeekNits); backColor.b = hlgInvOOTF(luminance, backColor.b, uPeekNits); const float hlgA = 0.17883277; const float hlgB = 1.0 - 4.0 * hlgA; const float hlgC = 0.5 - hlgA * log(4.0 * hlgA); vec3 pqOETF(vec3 rgb) { const float ST2084_m1 = 2610.0 / (4096.0 * 4.0); const float ST2084_m2 = (2523.0 / 4096.0) * 128.0; rgb = pow(rgb, vec3(ST2084_m2)); return rgb; } float uncharted2(float x) { float A = 0.15; float B = 0.50; float C = 0.10; float D = 0.20; float E = 0.02; float F = 0.30; return ((x * (A * x + C * B) + D * E) / (x * (A * x + B) + D * F)) - E / F; } float uncharted2_inv(float x) { float y = x; if (y > 0.8) { y = (y - 0.8) * 0.5 + 0.8; } float A = 0.15; float B = 0.50; float C = 0.10; float D = 0.20; float E = 0.01; float F = 0.30; float G = B * B * F * F - 4.0 * A * D * pow(F, 3.0); float H = 4.0 * A * D * pow(F, 3.0) + (-4.0 * A * D * E - 2.0 * B * B * C) * F * F + 2.0 * B * B * E * F; float I = B * B * C * C * F * F - 2.0 * B * B * C * E * F + B * B * E * E; return -(sqrt(G * y * y + H * y + I) + B * F * y - B * C * F + B * E) / (2.0 * A * F * y - 2.0 * A * F + 2.0 * A * E);} float hermiteSpline(float E, float KS, float maxLum) { float T = (E - KS) / (1.0 - KS); float T2 = T * T; float T3 = T2 * T; return clamp((2.0 * T3 - 3.0 * T2 + 1.0) * KS + (T3 - 2.0 * T2 + T) * (1.0 - KS) + (3.0 * T2 - 2.0 * T3) * maxLum, 0.0, 1.0); } vec3 pqEETF(vec3 rgb, vec2 lum) { vec3 ELw = pqOETF(vec3(1.0)); vec3 ELb = pqOETF(vec3(0.0)); vec3 E1 = (rgb - ELb) / (ELw - ELb); vec3 minLum = (pqOETF(vec3(lum.x / 10000.0)) - ELb) / (ELw - ELb); vec3 maxLum = (pqOETF(vec3(lum.y / 10000.0)) - ELb) / (ELw - ELb); float KS = clamp(1.5 * maxLum.x - 0.5, 0.0, 1.0); float b = minLum.x; vec3 E2 = E1; if (E1.r >= KS) E2.r = hermiteSpline(E1.r, KS, maxLum.x); if (E1.g >= KS) E2.g = hermiteSpline(E1.g, KS, maxLum.x); if (E1.b >= KS) E2.b = hermiteSpline(E1.b, KS, maxLum.x); vec3 E3 = E2 + b * pow(1.0 - E2, vec3(4.0)); return E3 * (ELw - ELb) + ELb; } vec4 colorMapping(vec4 color, vec4 colorSpaceTransYuvVector, mat3 colorSpaceTransMatrix) { float gammaValue = 2.4; color.rgb = pow(color.rgb, vec3(gammaValue)); color.rgb = clamp(color.rgb, 0.0, 1.0); float peakDSLNits = 100.0; float sig = max(max(color.r, color.g), color.b); float y = sig; if (sig <= 1e-6) { sig = 1e-6; } float n = dot(colorSpaceTransYuvVector.rgb, color.rgb) / sig; y = y * uncharted2(peakDSLNits); float sigItm = uncharted2_inv(y); float yLuma = y * n; float sigItmLuma = uncharted2_inv(yLuma) / n; float coeff = max(sigItm, 1e-6) / max(sigItm + 4.0, 1e-6); float sigOri = sigItm * (1.0 - coeff) + sigItmLuma * coeff; color.rgb *= vec3(sigOri / sig); color.rgb = colorSpaceTransMatrix * color.rgb; vec3 backColor = color.rgb; color.rgb /= vec3(peakDSLNits); color.rgb = pqOETF(color.rgb); if (uUseHDRDisplaySettings == 1) { backColor.rgb = backColor.rgb * 0.02; backColor.rgb = pqOETF(backColor.rgb); backColor.rgb = pqEETF(backColor.rgb, vec2(0.0, uPeekNits)); color.rgb = pow(color.rgb, vec3(gammaValue)); color.rgb = clamp(color.rgb, 0.0, 1.0); float peakDSLNits = 100.0; float sig = max(max(color.r, color.g), color.b); float y = sig; if (sig <= 1e-6) { sig = 1e-6; float a = inputColor.a; if (uPremultiplyAlpha == 1 && a < 1.0) { inputColor = float4(inputColor.rgb * float3(a, a, a), a); } if (fabs(a) < 1e-6) { inputColor = float4(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0); } float3 mappingRgb = colorMapping(inputColor, uColorSpaceTransYuvVector, uColorSpaceTransMatrix, uPeekNits, uHDRMix).rgb; out.outColor = float4(mappingRgb, a); return out; }
float innerLog10(float x) { return (1.0 / log(10.0)) * log(x); } float innerLog2(float x) { return (1.0 / log(2.0)) * log(x); } float calculateHlgSysGamma(float peakDSLNits) { float sysGammaBase = 1.2; float sysGamma = 0.0; float hlgk = 1.111; if ((400.0 <= peakDSLNits) && (peakDSLNits <= 1000.0)) { sysGamma = sysGammaBase + 0.42 * innerLog10(peakDSLNits / 1000.0); } else { sysGamma = sysGammaBase * pow(hlgk, innerLog2(peakDSLNits / 1000.0)); } return sysGamma; } float hlgOOTF_win(float sceneLuminance, float sceneLightComponent, float peakDSLNits) { float sysGamma = calculateHlgSysGamma(peakDSLNits); float displayLightComponent = 0.0; if (sceneLuminance <= 0.0) { displayLightComponent = 0.0; } else { displayLightComponent = peakDSLNits * pow(sceneLuminance, sysGamma - 1.0) * sceneLightComponent; } displayLightComponent = clamp(displayLightComponent, 0.0, peakDSLNits); return displayLightComponent; } float sdrOETF(float displaylight) { float gamma = 2.40; float Lb = 0.0; float Lw = 100.0; float srgbnorm = 0.0; float norm_displaylight = (displaylight - Lb) / (Lw - Lb); if (norm_displaylight == 0.0) { srgbnorm = 0.0; } else if (norm_displaylight == 1.0) { srgbnorm = 1.0; } else if (norm_displaylight <= 0.0031308) { srgbnorm = 12.92 * norm_displaylight; } else { srgbnorm = 1.055 * pow(norm_displaylight, 1.0 / gamma) - 0.055; } return srgbnorm; } float hlgInvOETF(float color) { float hlgA = 0.17883277; float hlgB = 1.0 - 4.0 * hlgA; float hlgC = 0.5 - hlgA * log(4.0 * hlgA); float sceneLightComponent = 0.0; if (color <= 0.5) { sceneLightComponent = pow(color, 2.0) / 3.0; } else { sceneLightComponent = (exp((color - hlgC) / hlgA) + hlgB) / 12.0; } return clamp(sceneLightComponent, 0.0, 1.0); } float hlgOOTF(float lum, float color) { float lumPow = pow(lum, 0.4); float sceneColor = 12.0 * lumPow * color; return clamp(sceneColor, 0.0, 12.0); } float uncharted2(float x) { float A = 0.15; float B = 1.30; float C = 0.10; float D = 0.20; float E = 0.02; float F = 0.30; return ((x * (A * x + C * B) + D * E) / (x * (A * x + B) + D * F)) - E / F; } vec4 colorMapping(vec4 color, vec4 colorSpaceTransYuvVector, mat3 colorSpaceTransMatrix) { color.r = hlgInvOETF(color.r); color.g = hlgInvOETF(color.g); color.b = hlgInvOETF(color.b); if (uUseHDRDisplaySettings == 1) { float sig = max(max(color.r, color.g), color.b); float lum = dot(colorSpaceTransYuvVector.rgb, color.rgb); sig = 0.5 * lum + 0.5 * sig; float inner_peakDSLNits = (uHDRMix * (-900.0)) + 1000.0; color.r = hlgOOTF_win(sig, color.r, inner_peakDSLNits); color.g = hlgOOTF_win(sig, color.g, inner_peakDSLNits); color.b = hlgOOTF_win(sig, color.b, inner_peakDSLNits); color.rgb = colorSpaceTransMatrix * color.rgb; color.r = sdrOETF(color.r); color.g = sdrOETF(color.g); } float calculateHlgSysGamma(float peakDSLNits) { float hlgk = 1.111; float sysGammaBase = 1.2; float sysGamma = 0.0; if ((400.0 <= peakDSLNits) && (peakDSLNits <= 2000.0)) { sysGamma = sysGammaBase + 0.42 * innerLog10(peakDSLNits / 1000.0); float displayLightComponent = 0.0; if (sceneLuminance == 0.0) { displayLightComponent = 0.0; } else { displayLightComponent = peakDSLNits * pow(sceneLuminance, sysGamma - 1.0) * sceneLightComponent; } displayLightComponent = clamp(displayLightComponent, 0.0, peakDSLNits); const float ST2084_c3 = (2392.0 / 4096.0) * 32.0; rgb = pow(rgb, vec3(ST2084_m1)); rgb = (ST2084_c1 + ST2084_c2 * rgb) / (1.0 + ST2084_c3 * rgb); rgb = pow(rgb, vec3(ST2084_m2)); return rgb; } void main() { vec3 yuv; yuv.z = texture2D(uSamplerTexture3, vSamplerCoord).r * uColorScale * uScaleAndOffset[1] - uScaleAndOffset[3] * uScaleAndOffset[1]; vec3 videoColor = uColorConversionMatrix * yuv; if (uHaveAlphaChannel == 1) { if (uPremultiplyAlpha == 1) { alpha = texture2D(uSamplerTextureAlpha, vSamplerCoord).r * uColorScale; videoColor *= alpha; } else { alpha = texture2D(uSamplerTextureAlpha, vSamplerCoord).r * uColorScale * uScaleAndOffset[0] - uScaleAndOffset[2] * uScaleAndOffset[0]; } } if (uDisplayTransferType == 7) { videoColor = clamp(videoColor, 0.0, 1.0);
